title: OpenClaw Agent
description: Structured OpenClaw's modular skill architecture across 6 domains at MyVyay, expanding to 5+ concurrent sessions via a real-time Python logging pipeline. Implemented context pruning strategies to reduce LLM token usage and improve agent task success rate by 45%.
stats: 6 skill domains · 5+ concurrent sessions · 45% higher task success · context pruning

nodes.label: User Command
nodes.description: Natural language task from the user via messaging interface

nodes.label: Agent Planner
nodes.description: LLM-based planner decomposes task into sub-goals and selects skill

nodes.label: Memory & Context
nodes.description: Context pruning to reduce token usage while preserving task history

nodes.label: IDE Skill
nodes.description: Automated IDE operations — file creation, code edits, terminal commands

nodes.label: GitHub Skill
nodes.description: GitHub API integration — PRs, issues, commits, workflow triggers

nodes.label: Python Logger
nodes.description: Real-time logging pipeline tracking agent actions across 5+ sessions

nodes.label: Task Result
nodes.description: Completed task delivered back to user with execution trace

title: TapVision — Multi-Model AI Pipeline
description: Developed TapVision's multi-format ingestion pipeline converting PDF, URL, and text inputs via 4 orchestrated Hugging Face models — TTS, STT, translation (MarianMT), and summarisation. Built at CDAC with Streamlit frontend, reducing latency by 35% and model size by 50% via INT4 quantization.
stats: 4 orchestrated models · 35% latency reduction · 50% smaller models · multilingual

nodes.label: Multi-Format Input
nodes.description: Accepts PDF, URL, and raw text — parsed and normalized

nodes.label: Summarisation
nodes.description: Hugging Face summarisation model condenses long-form content

nodes.label: Translation
nodes.description: MarianMT multilingual translation across 3+ target languages

nodes.label: Text-to-Speech
nodes.description: gTTS / pyttsx3 for audio output with voice command support

nodes.label: Speech-to-Text
nodes.description: STT model for voice-driven query input

nodes.label: INT4 Quantization
nodes.description: Ollama INT4 quantization — 50% model size reduction, faster inference

nodes.label: Streamlit UI
nodes.description: Web interface for multi-format input, output playback, and translation

title: Multilingual CMS AI Agent
description: Piloted an LLM-based AI agent into a proprietary CMS via REST APIs at MyVyay, adapting the NLP layer for 3+ languages and multi-format inputs. Optimised with Hugging Face and Ollama INT4 quantization, cutting setup time by 50% and IT dependency by 70%.
stats: 3+ languages · 50% faster setup · 70% less IT dependency · production CMS

nodes.label: CMS User
nodes.description: User interacts via the CMS interface in their preferred language

nodes.label: REST API Layer
nodes.description: FastAPI/Flask REST endpoints bridging CMS frontend to AI backend

nodes.label: NLP Processor
nodes.description: Language detection and multi-format input parsing (text, voice, file)

nodes.label: LLM Agent
nodes.description: Ollama-hosted LLM with INT4 quantization for efficient local inference

nodes.label: Multilingual Layer
nodes.description: Handles 3+ languages — English, Hindi, Marathi — with Hugging Face models

nodes.label: CMS Backend
nodes.description: Proprietary CMS — content creation, editing, and management automation

nodes.label: AI Response
nodes.description: Contextual response delivered in user's language with CMS action taken
